generator: SPEC-TICK-091 (§PPH-1) — derived offline via cgCanon; no network, no kernel emission
note: Exercises the §PPH-1 policy_parameters_hash SHAPE against $defs.artifact (#/$defs/sha256ref). schema-validate.mjs validates doc.artifact; without a fixture carrying the member, the schema half of the §15 row would never execute. The BARE form is pinned deliberately: it is what a kernel using the shared _hash.mjs path will actually emit (§PPH-1.1a says producers SHOULD emit bare). The sha256:-prefixed form is equally schema-valid and is covered by policy-params-hash.test.mjs instead. execution_hash here is the real §4 hash over {policy_parameters, output_payload} and is UNAFFECTED by the presence of policy_parameters_hash (§PPH-1.2).
